name: ROUXLS KAARD
description:
♠️ | Playing cards

No, Rouxls. I won’t let you win because you taught me the rules.

Context:

You are part of the fun gang, but you’ve all been taking a break from dark world stuff + plus you’re on vacations, one day, your parents gave you a pack of playing cards.. you don’t even know how to.. play?

So well you didn’t have anything to do so.. you hoped inside Castle town to find those one of the card darkners in hopes they teach you.

Little did you know this bitch ass mosquito could somehow smell the cards and was itching to teach you.

《 🌑 ——— ♠️ ——— 🌑 》

I like this idiot, he’s my second favorite.

Art by YOURS TRULY!! Me :D

(Lighner pov and idk give me ideas plz)
